hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: bootstrap-claims-tenant
commands.description: Bootstraps the claims for a new tenant.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --claimsAppId
options.description: The Azure AD app ID for the claims service.

options.name: --claimsServiceUrl
options.description: The base URL for the Claims Service

options.name: --adminPrincipalObjectId
options.description: The object ID of the principal that is to be granted administrative control over the Claims Service. If left blank, will use the object ID of the principal making the initialistion request.

options.name: --keyVault
options.description: The key vault containing the details of the AAD App to use when authenticating to the Claims service

options.name: --secretName
options.description: The name of the key vault secret containing the details of the AAD App to use when authenticating to the Claims service

options.name: --marainTenant
options.description: The Marain tenant ID to pass

options.name: --tenantId
options.description: The tenant against which to authenticate

options.name: --devAzCliAuth
options.description: Authenticate using the token last fetched by the 'az' CLI

options.name: --marainClaimsHeaderValue
options.description: Used for when running against a local debug instance of Claims. Will send X-MARAIN-CLAIMS header with {"roles":["<this-value>"]} to authenticate, instead of using OAuth2.

commands.name: define-claims
commands.description: Define the rules and claims for a tenant.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --claimsAppId
options.description: The name of the Application Role in the Claims Service that is to be granted administrative control over the Claims Service

options.name: --claimsServiceUrl
options.description: The base URL for the Claims Service

options.name: --filePath
options.description: The file defining the rule sets and claim permissions

options.name: --keyVault
options.description: The key vault containing the details of the AAD App to use when authenticating to the Claims service

options.name: --secretName
options.description: The name of the key vault secret containing the details of the AAD App to use when authenticating to the Claims service

options.name: --marainTenant
options.description: The Marain tenant ID to pass

options.name: --tenantId
options.description: The tenant against which to authenticate

options.name: --devAzCliAuth
options.description: Authenticate using the token last fetched by the 'az' CLI

options.name: --marainClaimsHeaderValue
options.description: Used for when running against a local debug instance of Claims. Will send X-MARAIN-CLAIMS header with {"roles":["<this-value>"]} to authenticate, instead of using OAuth2.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --subscriptionId
options.description: ID of the Azure subscription to inspect

options.name: --resourceGroupName
options.description: The resource group containing the service

options.name: --name
